task:
In the Blender file open at /home/user/Documents/lookdev_scene.blend, build a lookdev scene that combines geometry-nodes scattering, a rigid-body stack, PBR materials, and a compositor post-effects chain. Delete the default Cube.

Objects:
- Plane 'Ground' at the origin, scale 10 on X and Y
- Ico Sphere 'Pebble' (small, viewport visibility disabled)
- Cubes 'Brick.001', 'Brick.002', 'Brick.003' at z = 2, 3, 4 respectively

Geometry nodes: a modifier named 'Scatter' on 'Ground' whose node group is wired Group Input (Geometry) -> Distribute Points on Faces (Density = 25) -> Instance on Points (Instance input = 'Pebble' object via an Object Info node) -> Group Output (Geometry).

Rigid bodies:
- 'Ground' = PASSIVE
- 'Brick.001', 'Brick.002', 'Brick.003' = ACTIVE, each with mass = 1.5
- Scene gravity = (0, 0, -9.81)
- Rigid Body World exists with cache frame_start = 1, frame_end = 120

Materials:
- 'GoldMat' (assigned to 'Brick.001'): Principled BSDF with Base Color = (1.0, 0.78, 0.34, 1.0), Metallic = 1.0, Roughness = 0.25.
- 'GlassMat' (assigned to 'Brick.002'): Glass BSDF (not Principled) with Color = (0.9, 0.95, 1.0, 1.0), IOR = 1.52, output wired into Material Output Surface.

Render settings: Engine = CYCLES, resolution = 1280 x 720, scene frame_end = 120.

Compositor: Enable 'Use Nodes'. Build the chain: Render Layers Image -> Glare (type FOG_GLOW) -> Blur (type GAUSS, Size X = 5, Size Y = 5) -> Composite Image; also wire Glare Image -> Viewer Image.

Save the file.

verification.description: Ground has a Geometry Nodes modifier

verification.eval: any({n.get('type') for n in m.get('nodes',[])} >= {'DISTRIBUTE_POINTS_ON_FACES','INSTANCE_ON_POINTS'} for m in result.get('geometry_modifiers',[]))
verification.description: Geometry nodes graph has Distribute Points on Faces + Instance on Points

verification.eval: any(any(n.get('type')=='DISTRIBUTE_POINTS_ON_FACES' and abs(float(n['inputs'].get('Density',0))-25)<0.5 for n in m.get('nodes',[])) for m in result.get('geometry_modifiers',[]))
any(o.get('name')=='Ground' and str(o.get('type'))=='PASSIVE' for o in result.get('objects',[]))
verification.description: Ground has a PASSIVE rigid body

verification.eval: all(any(o.get('name')==bn and str(o.get('type'))=='ACTIVE' and abs(float(o.get('mass',0))-1.5)<0.05 for o in result.get('objects',[])) for bn in ('Brick.001','Brick.002','Brick.003'))
verification.description: All three Bricks are ACTIVE rigid bodies with mass 1.5

verification.eval: result.get('rigidbody_world') is not None and int(result['rigidbody_world'].get('frame_start') or 0)<=1 and int(result['rigidbody_world'].get('frame_end') or 0)>=120
verification.description: Rigid body world cache covers frames 1-120

verification.eval: any(n.get('type')=='BSDF_PRINCIPLED' and abs(n['inputs'].get('Base Color',[0,0,0,0])[0]-1.0)<0.05 and abs(n['inputs'].get('Base Color',[0,0,0,0])[1]-0.78)<0.05 and abs(n['inputs'].get('Base Color',[0,0,0,0])[2]-0.34)<0.05 and abs(float(n['inputs'].get('Metallic',0))-1.0)<0.05 and abs(float(n['inputs'].get('Roughness',0))-0.25)<0.05 for n in result.get('nodes',[]))
verification.description: GoldMat Principled BSDF: Base Color near (1.0, 0.78, 0.34), Metallic 1.0, Roughness 0.25

verification.eval: any(n.get('type')=='BSDF_GLASS' and abs(float(n['inputs'].get('IOR',0))-1.52)<0.02 for n in result.get('nodes',[]))
verification.description: GlassMat has Glass BSDF with IOR 1.52

verification.eval: any(l.get('to_socket')=='Surface' and any(n.get('name')==l.get('from_node') and n.get('type')=='BSDF_GLASS' for n in result.get('nodes',[])) for l in result.get('links',[]))
verification.description: Glass BSDF linked to Material Output Surface
Compositor has Render Layers, Glare, Blur, Composite, Viewer

verification.eval: any(n.get('type')=='GLARE' and str(n.get('glare_type','')).upper().replace(' ','_')=='FOG_GLOW' for n in result.get('nodes',[]))
any(n.get('type')=='BLUR' and int(n.get('size_x') or 0)==5 and int(n.get('size_y') or 0)==5 for n in result.get('nodes',[]))
